title: 请英语好的葱友帮我一下，这2句话啥意思
meta_description: 请英语好的葱友帮我一下，这2句话啥意思 - Extra combat (with same unit) if unit disengaging. Not activated if commander’s unit is under 4 strength.  Counterfire effects p...
meta_keywords: 英语,葱友,帮我,一下,句话,意思
contents:
Extra combat (with same unit) if unit disengaging. Not activated if commander’s unit is under 4 strength.

Counterfire effects persist, counterfire is not performed again, all the damage is still present.

背景是一款兵棋游戏的规则说明
